text: Missed the gym this morning for the third time this week. Planned to go after working on the column draft, but it didn't happen. Noticed a direct impact on sharpness and patience from skipping it. Not surprising, but important to note.
{"notes": "Missed the gym for the third time this week. Noticed decreased sharpness and less patience as a result.", "date": "2023-10-12"}
{"notes": "Missed gym for the third time this week. Noticed feeling sharper and less patient.", "date": "2026-05-18"}

Missed the gym again this morning, making it three times this week. I had the intention to go after working on the column, but it didn't materialize. I've observed a clear connection between skipping the gym and feeling sharper, but also notably less patient. This isn't a new discovery, but it's a pattern I need to pay more attention to.
